question: Will the U.S. officially lift/issue a formal waiver on sanctions for any Chinese entity purchasing Iranian oil by May 31
evidence: April 24, 2026: U.S. sanctions Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery Co. Ltd. and 40 shipping firms for processing Iranian crude oil.
May 1, 2026: U.S. sanctions Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal Co. for receiving Iranian crude oil.
May 11, 2026: U.S. sanctions 12 entities and individuals for facilitating Iranian oil sales to China.
searchQueries: U.S. sanctions waiver on Chinese entities purchasing Iranian oil May 2026
raw: {"yes_probability": 0.05, "confidence": "high", "short_reason": "U.S. has recently imposed sanctions on Chinese entities involved in Iranian oil trade.", "key_evidence": ["April 24, 2026: U.S. sanctions Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) Refinery Co. Ltd. and 40 shipping firms for processing Iranian crude oil.", "May 1, 2026: U.S. sanctions Qingdao Haiye Oil Terminal Co. for receiving Iranian crude oil.", "May 11, 2026: U.S. sanctions 12 entities and individuals for facilitating Iranian oil sales to China."], "source_urls": ["https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0472", "https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0476", "https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0498"]}
